call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. Yeah, I was just looking at options. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. That's, uh, based on the information you provided. What are you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: I'm thinking of consolidating some credit card debt. It's just… getting a little out of hand. 
Agent: Absolutely, that's a really smart move. We can definitely help with that. With this loan, you'd have one fixed monthly payment, and potentially save a lot on interest. We can look at different terms, like 36, 48, or 60 months. 
Eleanor: Hmm, 48 months sounds good. What would the monthly payment be roughly? 
Agent: Let me calculate that for you… Okay, at 48 months, your estimated monthly payment would be around $230. Does that fit within your budget? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that's manageable. What are the fees associated with the loan? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150. And, of course, your regular monthly payments. No prepayment penalties, though! 
Eleanor: Okay, that sounds pretty good. I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's get the application process started. I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a low introductory rate. We are pre-approving you for a $2500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 19.99%... 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: (Interrupting) No thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark from GreenTech mentioned something. I'm looking at renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. What's the scope of the renovation? 
Jessica: It's a pretty big project. New cabinets, countertops, appliances… the whole thing. 
Agent: Okay, so around $15,000 should cover it. We have flexible repayment terms. Let's talk about what monthly payment you're comfortable with. 
Jessica: I was hoping to keep it under $300 a month. 
Agent: Let me see… With a 60-month term, your monthly payment would be approximately $330. We could extend it to 72 months, bringing it down to around $250, but you'd pay a little more in interest overall. 
Jessica: Hmm, $330 is a bit high. Is there any wiggle room on the interest rate? 
Agent: Let me check with my supervisor… (pause) Okay, I can offer you 12.25% if you agree to a 60-month term. That would bring your monthly payment down to $320. 
Jessica: That's better. Okay, I think I can work with that. What's the next step? 
Agent: Great! Let's get the application started. I'll need to verify some information…

Agent: Hi Michael, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, right. I was just checking what my options were. 
Agent: We are pre-approving you for a $5000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 17.99%. It offers great rewards and a low introductory APR. 
Michael: 17.99%? That seems a little high. I've seen lower rates elsewhere. 
Agent: Well, sir, our card offers a lot of benefits, including cash back on purchases and travel rewards. 
Michael: I appreciate that, but the interest rate is a big factor for me. I'm trying to build my credit, and a high rate won't help. 
Agent: I understand. Let me see if there's anything I can do… Unfortunately, that's the best rate we can offer at this time, given your credit score. 
Michael: Okay. Well, I think I'll pass for now. Thanks anyway. 
Agent: Alright, sir. If you change your mind, feel free to contact us. Have a good day.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… 
Patricia: (Interrupting, loudly) You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, we are pre-approving you for a $3000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%... 
Patricia: 24.99?! Are you serious? This is ridiculous! I want my number removed from your list! 
Agent: I… uh… I can certainly do that, ma'am. 
Patricia: Just don't call me again! *click*
